p1_summary.source: freshly computed from real P1_Global model artefacts

T0_pillar1_raw_fresh.csv.description: P1 Global EEGNet accuracy (freshly computed from real model artefacts)

T0_pillar2_raw_fresh.csv.description: P2 Subject-Dependent EEGNet accuracy (E3 freshly computed; other exps from prior run)

T0_pillar3_raw_fresh.csv.description: P3 Subject-Dependent SVM accuracy from prior computed run

T1_p1_descriptive_stats.csv.description: P1 Global EEGNet descriptive statistics and one-sample t-test against chance

T2_cross_pillar_summary.csv.description: Cross-pillar accuracy summary: mean, median, max, std, gain over chance

T3_wilcoxon_p2_vs_p3.csv.description: Wilcoxon Signed-Rank test: P2 vs P3 (best per subject), Holm-Bonferroni corrected

T3_per_subject_p2_vs_p3.csv.description: Per-subject best accuracy comparison: P2 vs P3

T4_subject_rescue.csv.description: Subject rescue analysis: subjects where P3 outperforms P2

T5_champion_grand_matrix.csv.description: Grand summary matrix for the champion model (P2/E3/S11)

T5_per_class_recall.csv.description: Per-class precision, recall, F1-score for the champion model

T6_shap_channel_importance.csv.description: SHAP channel importance (mean absolute SHAP) and FDR for champion model

T6_n400_temporal_auc.csv.description: N400 AUC values for E3 champion and E0 baseline reference

T7_friedman_avg_ranks.csv.description: Average ranks from Friedman test on P2 (k=8 configurations, n=12 subjects)

T8_p3_feature_ablation.csv.description: P3 feature group ablation statistics across all experiments and subjects

T9_inference_latency.csv.description: Inference latency (mean, 95th percentile) for P2 EEGNet and P3 SVM
